advanced_flow.label: Advanced approval flow
advanced_flow.description: Route approvals based on defined criteria. Multiple flows per type, evaluated in priority order.

default_flow.label: Default approval flow
default_flow.description: Used if no matching advanced flow found. Fallback/catch-all flow.

ui_components: Left sidebar with scrollable flow type tabs
Advanced approval flow section with Add advance flow button
Default approval flow section with inline configuration
Add step button for sequential approval levels
Add approver button for OR parallel approvers
Add block button for approval blocks
Approver role dropdown with system and custom roles
Update approval flows button to save changes

findings: Advanced approval flow section present with 'If conditions' label
Add advance flow button opens dialog with Flow name, Description, Criteria, and Approval steps
Criteria configuration supports 60+ data points including Department, Office, Leave Type, Employee attributes
Default flow configured with Super Admin OR Line Manager - 1
Custom roles can be created and used as approvers
Sequential steps supported with numbered ordering
OR logic between approvers within same step for redundancy
Payroll Transaction tab present at /enterprise/dashboard/approval-flow/payroll-transaction-request-flow
Advanced + Default sections both available
Default flow: Super Admin OR Payroll table admin (OR condition confirmed)
Add step and Add approver buttons available for multi-level hierarchy
Maker-checker controls enforceable through multi-step configuration
Expense tab present at /enterprise/dashboard/approval-flow/expense-flow
1 existing advanced flow ('test') configured
Default flow: Super Admin as approver
Independent from Payroll Transaction - separate tab
Full approval configuration capabilities available
Role Management at /enterprise/dashboard/roles under Settings > Organization
Two tabs: Role assignment and Custom roles
Assign roles button present for assigning roles to employees
Employee table shows all role assignments with Edit capability
Multiple roles per employee confirmed (e.g., 25+ roles for some employees)
Custom roles tab: 15 custom roles with Add new, view, edit, delete actions
Custom roles include Business Travel Approver, Line Manager variants, General Manager, etc.
OR logic is fully supported between approvers within same step
Advanced flows support 60+ criteria data points for conditional routing
Multiple advanced flows can coexist with priority ordering
Some specific criteria (client, project fields) may not be available for all flow types

WOF-002.theme: Missing Approval Workflows in Key Modules
findings: Business Trip Request NOW HAS a dedicated approval flow tab
Business Travel Approver custom role exists
Payroll Transaction has dedicated approval flow
Commission processing: no dedicated tab found
Custom flow types can be created to address module gaps
Custom roles ARE supported (15 custom roles found, Add new button available)
Admin-only access to approval flow config is by design (security)
Feature flag enforcement not testable from UI
Cannot verify notification routing from UI alone
Requires end-to-end testing with actual approval submissions
Listed as known limitation
Leave Salary Request tab exists with full approval flow configuration
Status is Won't Do - product team chose not to pursue
UI appears functional for its intended purpose
